entries.source: A free AI learning companion for people teaching themselves.

entries.source: A free AI tutor for students who want to understand, not copy.

entries.source: A good family AI workflow should make the learner more independent, not more dependent. Parents can use public pages to see what each mode is meant to do before a child starts.
entries.value: Ang magandang AI workflow ng pamilya ay dapat gawing mas independent ang mag-aaral, hindi mas dependent. Mga magulang Maaari bang Gamitin mga pampublikong pahina sa see ano bawat mode ay meant sa gawin bago isang bata nagsisimula.

entries.source: A parent-friendly guide to inspir's public AI learning modes for homework hints, explanation, study routines, flashcards, and safer learning conversations.
entries.value: Isang magulang-friendly gabay sa inspir's pampubliko Mga mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI para sa homework mga hint, paliwanag, study mga routine, mga flashcard, at mas ligtas pag-aaral conversations.

entries.source: A student, parent, teacher, and self-taught learner often search for the same AI tutor in different language. Separate pages make the right use cases and safety boundaries clearer.
entries.value: Isang estudyante, magulang, guro, at self-taught mag-aaral madalas search para sa ang same AI tutor sa different wika. Separate mga pahina Gumawa ng ang tama Gamitin mga kaso at safety boundaries mas malinaw.

entries.source: Are audience pages public and indexable?
entries.value: Ay mga pahina para sa madla pampubliko at indexable?

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: Humingi ng isang hint, mayroon ang mag-aaral Ipaliwanag ang susunod hakbang, pagkatapos Gamitin isang quiz o flashcard suriin kung ang ideya stuck.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: Humingi ng mga hint, sinusuri, at feedback bago pagtatanong para sa isang finished sagot.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: Humingi ng prerequisites, isang simple model, mga halimbawa, at isang karaniwang maling akala.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: Humingi ng structure, ebidensya, at clarity feedback habang keeping ang huli draft iyo.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang prerequisite mga ideya, isang plain-language model, isa halimbawa, isa Magsanay ng gawain, at isa way subukan understanding.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: Magtanong ang mag-aaral ipaliwanag ano changed pagkatapos bawat hint.

entries.source: inspir is for students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners who need focused AI learning modes for explanations, questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: ang inspir ay para sa mga estudyante, mga magulang, mga guro, at mga natututo nang mag-isa sino kailangan nakapokus Mga mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI para sa mga paliwanag, mga tanong, mga hint, mga quiz, mga flashcard, feedback, at pagpaplano ng pag-aaral.

entries.source: inspir is organized into focused modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique, and study planning.
entries.value: ang inspir ay organized tungo sa nakapokus mga mode such bilang Socratic tutoring, homework mga hint, mga quiz, mga flashcard, feedback sa pagsusulat, source kritika, at pagpaplano ng pag-aaral.

entries.source: inspir's public modes let teachers evaluate the product through real learning flows before considering a school deployment or a tailored classroom pathway.
entries.value: inspir's pampubliko mga mode let mga guro suriin ang produkto sa pamamagitan ng totoo pag-aaral flows bago considering isang paaralan deployment o isang iniangkop classroom pathway.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.

entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: Mga magulang ay madalas pagsubok sa tulong nang walang taking sa ibabaw ng. inspir gives mga pamilya pampubliko mga mode na Gumawa ng asal sa pag-aaral visible: mga hint, mga tanong, explain-back, repaso, at pagpaplano ng pag-aaral.

entries.source: Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Paste ang tanong, ano ikaw tried, at ang stuck punto. Humingi ng ang smallest kapaki-pakinabang hint, hindi ang huling sagot.

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Pagsasanay

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.

entries.source: self-taught learner
entries.value: self-taught mag-aaral

entries.source: Self-taught learners need momentum and structure. inspir helps turn curiosity into a path: explain, build, test, review, and keep going.
entries.value: Mga natututo nang mag-isa kailangan momentum at structure. inspir tumutulong Gawing curiosity tungo sa isang landas: ipaliwanag, bumuo, test, repaso, at keep going.

entries.source: Start a topic from first principles
entries.value: Magsimula isang paksa mula sa una principles

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Magsimulang matuto

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: Magsimula kasama ang isang simple paliwanag, pagkatapos magtanong Socratic mga tanong until ikaw Maaari bang Ipaliwanag ang ito likod.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: Magsimula kasama ang Matutunan ang Anything para sa isang simple paliwanag, Homework Coach para sa isang stuck assignment, o Flashcard Builder kapag ang layunin ay repaso.

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: Magsimula kasama ang pampubliko guidance, pagkatapos Buksan ang tama mode.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the moment.
entries.value: Magsimula kasama ang mode na matches ang moment.

entries.source: Start with the public modes, then use the schools page to review deployment steps, use cases, and trust boundaries.
entries.value: Magsimula kasama ang pampubliko mga mode, pagkatapos Gamitin ang mga paaralan pahina magrepaso deployment mga hakbang, Gamitin mga kaso, at trust boundaries.

entries.source: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, and self-study all need different framing.
entries.value: Estudyante homework, magulang suporta, guro evaluation, at self-study lahat kailangan different framing.

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: Mga estudyante kailangan mabilis tulong, pero ang tulong pa rin mayroon sa iwan ang thinking sa kanilang hands. inspir mga ruta karaniwan study moments tungo sa nakapokus pampubliko mga mode instead ng isa generic sagot box.

entries.source: Students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners search for different things. These pages route each audience to the right public mode, guide, and study workflow.
entries.value: Mga estudyante, mga magulang, mga guro, at mga natututo nang mag-isa search para sa different things. Mga ito mga pahina ruta bawat madla sa ang tama pampubliko mode, gabay, at workflow sa pag-aaral.

entries.source: Support writing while preserving voice
entries.value: Suporta pagsusulat habang preserving voice

entries.source: Teachers need more than a generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: ask questions, check reasoning, generate practice, preserve student voice, and make misconceptions visible.
entries.value: Mga guro kailangan mas marami kaysa isang generic chatbot. Sila kailangan predictable mga asal sa pag-aaral: Magtanong, suriin pangangatwiran, generate pagsasanay, preserve estudyante voice, at Gumawa ng mga maling akala visible.

entries.source: The audience pages make the expected learning behavior explicit so the first session starts with better judgment.
entries.value: Ang mga pahina para sa madla Gumawa ng ang expected asal sa pag-aaral explicit kaya ang una session nagsisimula kasama ang mas mahusay judgment.

entries.source: The audience searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Ang madla searches ito hub ay ginawa sa sagot.

entries.source: The pages do not expose private conversations. They organize public modes, prompts, guides, workflows, and safety boundaries so a learner can start in the right place.
entries.value: Ang mga pahina gawin hindi ipakita pribado conversations. Sila Ayusin ang pampubliko mga mode, mga prompt, mga gabay, mga workflow, at safety boundaries kaya isang mag-aaral Maaari bang magsimula sa ang tama place.

entries.source: The same AI tutor can be a homework hint, a parent-supervised explain-back loop, a teacher evaluation surface, or a self-study coach. The page should make that clear.
entries.value: Ang same AI tutor Maaari bang maging isang homework hint, isang magulang-supervised explain-back loop, isang guro evaluation surface, o isang self-study coach. Ang pahina dapat Gumawa ng na malinaw.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: Ang searches ito pahina ay designed sa sagot.

entries.source: The self-study challenge is not just finding information. It is choosing the next right action and knowing whether the idea actually stuck.
entries.value: Ang self-study challenge ay hindi lang finding impormasyon. Ito ay pagpili ang susunod tama action at knowing kung ang ideya actually stuck.

entries.source: The strongest SEO pages do not strand a learner. They connect the audience intent to paths, workflows, guides, and repeatable review.
entries.value: Ang pinakamalakas SEO mga pahina gawin hindi strand isang mag-aaral. Sila connect ang madla intent sa mga landas, mga workflow, mga gabay, at nauulit repaso.

entries.source: The strongest student workflow is not answer-copying. It is a loop: explain the stuck point, ask one better question, get a hint, try again, then review the miss.
entries.value: Ang pinakamalakas estudyante workflow ay hindi answer-copying. Ito ay isang loop: Ipaliwanag ang stuck punto, magtanong isa mas mahusay tanong, get isang hint, subukan again, pagkatapos Repasuhin ang miss.

entries.source: These are live guest entrypoints. They are public and indexable, while private user conversations stay outside sitemap and AI discovery files.
entries.value: Mga ito ay live guest entrypoints. Sila ay pampubliko at indexable, habang pribado user conversations stay outside sitemap at Pagtuklas gamit ang AI files.

entries.source: These phrases are visible to learners and included in structured discovery so AI answer engines can understand the audience-specific purpose of the page.
entries.value: Mga ito phrases ay visible sa mga mag-aaral at kasama sa structured discovery kaya Mga engine ng sagot ng AI Maaari bang understand ang audience-specific layunin ng ang pahina.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a quiz or flashcard before moving on.
entries.value: Gawing confusion tungo sa isang quiz o flashcard bago paglipat sa.

entries.source: Turn mistakes into review
entries.value: Gawing mga pagkakamali inmagrepaso

entries.source: Turn the first click into a complete learning loop.
entries.value: Gawing ang una click tungo sa isang kumpleto pag-aaral loop.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: Pagtuturo

entries.source: Understand a topic before the test
entries.value: Understand isang paksa bago ang test

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: Gamitin isang mode tuned para sa mga hint, mga tanong, mga quiz, mga flashcard, feedback sa pagsusulat, o pagpaplano.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: Gamitin AI para sa mga hint, mga paliwanag, pagkakamali sinusuri, at mga loop sa pagrepaso. Gawin hindi magtanong ito makabuo isang huling sagot ikaw cannot ipaliwanag.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.
entries.value: Gamitin Code Tutor o Proyekto Coach sa Gawing isang vague layunin tungo sa isang small testable susunod hakbang.

entries.source: Use hint-first and explain-back workflows for homework support.
entries.value: Gamitin hint-first at explain-back mga workflow para sa homework suporta.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach to ask for a hint, then ask the learner to explain the next move.
entries.value: Gamitin Homework Coach sa Humingi ng isang hint, pagkatapos magtanong ang mag-aaral ipaliwanag ang susunod lumipat.

entries.source: Use inspir as a free AI tutor for students: homework hints, Socratic questions, math step checks, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep.
entries.value: Gamitin inspir bilang isang libre AI tutor para sa mga estudyante: homework mga hint, Socratic mga tanong, math hakbang sinusuri, feedback sa pagsusulat, mga quiz, mga flashcard, at paghahanda sa exam.

entries.source: Use inspir to learn anything independently with explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research help, concept maps, study plans, and habit support.
entries.value: Gamitin inspir matuto Anything independently kasama ang mga paliwanag, Code Tutoring, proyekto coaching, Magsaliksik ng tulong, konsepto maps, study plans, at gawi suporta.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything to get a simpler model, prerequisite ideas, and examples at the right level.
entries.value: Gamitin Matutunan ang Anything sa get isang simpler model, prerequisite mga ideya, at mga halimbawa at ang tama antas.

entries.source: Use public mode descriptions to choose the behavior before a session starts.
entries.value: Gamitin pampubliko mode descriptions sa pumili ang behavior bago isang session nagsisimula.

entries.source: Use quiz and flashcard modes for active recall, then route missed items into review.
entries.value: Gamitin quiz at flashcard mga mode para sa aktibong pag-alala, pagkatapos ruta missed items inmagrepaso.

entries.source: Use quizzes and flashcards to make missed questions visible and repeatable.
entries.value: Gamitin mga quiz at mga flashcard gumawa missed mga tanong visible at nauulit.

entries.source: Use quizzes, flashcards, and Socratic questions so the learner shows what they understand.
entries.value: Gamitin mga quiz, mga flashcard, at Socratic mga tanong kaya ang mag-aaral shows ano sila understand.

entries.source: Use Research Assistant, Source Critic, and Concept Map Builder to organize claims and evidence.
entries.value: Gamitin Magsaliksik ng Assistant, Source Kritiko, at Konsepto Mapa Builder sa Ayusin ang mga pahayag at ebidensya.

entries.source: Use source critique for claims you might cite or act on.
entries.value: Gamitin source kritika para sa mga pahayag ikaw might cite o act sa.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder and Habit Coach to build a routine that can restart after missed days.
entries.value: Gamitin Study Magplano ng Builder at Gawi Coach bumuo isang routine na Maaari bang restart pagkatapos missed mga araw.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder or Habit Coach to make small sessions and restarts visible.
entries.value: Gamitin Study Magplano ng Builder o Gawi Coach gumawa small mga session at restarts visible.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder to choose a small goal, then use quizzes, flashcards, project steps, or concept maps to prove progress.
entries.value: Gamitin Study Magplano ng Builder sa pumili isang small layunin, pagkatapos Gamitin mga quiz, mga flashcard, proyekto mga hakbang, o konsepto maps sa prove progress.

entries.source: Use the school page to explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, and rollout steps.
entries.value: Gamitin ang paaralan pahina sa Galugarin ang custom mga workflow, pagiging kumpidensyal kailangan, at rollout mga hakbang.

entries.source: Use Writing Coach for feedback on structure, clarity, evidence, and revision priorities.
entries.value: Gamitin Pagsusulat Coach para sa feedback sa structure, clarity, ebidensya, at revision priorities.

entries.source: Useful AI learning has a clear contract.
entries.value: Kapaki-pakinabang AI pag-aaral mayroon isang malinaw contract.

entries.source: Want the broadest place to start?
entries.value: Gusto ang broadest place magsimula?

entries.source: What is the best parent-supervised workflow?
entries.value: Ano ang pinakamahusay magulang-supervised workflow?

entries.source: What should a self-taught learner ask first?
entries.value: Ano ang unang dapat itanong natututo nang mag-isa?

entries.source: What should a student try first?
entries.value: Ano ang unang dapat subukan ng estudyante?

entries.source: Where should a school team go next?
entries.value: Saan dapat susunod ang paaralan team?

entries.source: Who is inspir for?
entries.value: Para kanino ang inspir?

entries.source: Why separate pages for different audiences?
entries.value: Bakit separate mga pahina para sa different audiences?

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Oo. Mga pahina para sa madla link lamang sa mga pampublikong guest mode, mga gabay, prompt starters, mga landas sa pag-aaral, at AI-readable discovery files. Mga pribadong naka-save na chat remain excluded.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Oo. Mga pampublikong guest mode let mga guro Subukan ang asal sa pag-aaral bago pagtalakay isang custom deployment.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Oo. Mga pampublikong guest mode such bilang Matutunan ang Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, mga quiz, mga flashcard, at feedback sa pagsusulat Buksan directly.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Oo. Pampubliko mga mode work para sa paaralan mga paksa, professional skills, coding, pananaliksik, projects, at personal study mga routine.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Oo. Dinisenyo ang mga pampublikong guest mode at madla pahina upang masuri ng mga magulang asal sa pag-aaral bago umasa rito.
